title: Maclean, Rachel - Minister of State for Housing and Planning, Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government - ACOBA advice
body: "Ms Maclean left her role at the Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government in November 2023.  Director of Strategy, The Conservative and Unionist Party  Ms Maclean sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with the Conservative and Unionist Party. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in December 2024 and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
